title: Figmento DESIGN.md v1.0
description: Intermediate representation of a parsed Figmento DESIGN.md file. Validates the shape produced by the import_design_system_from_md MCP tool after it extracts frontmatter, walks H2 sections, and parses fenced-block bodies via js-yaml. Does not validate raw markdown — the parser is responsible for tokenization, this schema is responsible for structural correctness. Schema version: 1.0.0 (see frontmatter.schema_version for authoring version).

format_variants.description: Figmento extension — per-format overrides keyed by format slug (e.g., 'instagram_post', 'a4_brochure'). Values are open objects with any override keys.

name.description: Kebab-case system identifier. Becomes the directory name under knowledge/design-systems/{name}/.

version.description: Semver version of the design system content. Defaults to 1.0.0 when absent.

created.description: ISO-8601 datetime. Preserved from tokens.yaml.created on round-trip.

source_url.description: Upstream origin URL when the system was ingested from somewhere. Maps to tokens.yaml.source.

figma_file_key.description: Figma file key this system is bound to. Reserved for future plugin-side workflows.

preset_used.description: Name of the Figmento preset used during generation, or null if none.

schema_version.description: DESIGN.md schema version. v1.0 is the only supported value today. Parser branches on this field for future v2 migration.

sections.description: Parsed sections of the DESIGN.md file. Keys are snake_case normalizations of the H2 headings. Only visual_theme_atmosphere and color_palette_roles OR typography_rules are required — other sections default to empty prose on tolerance.

mood.description: Mood tags extracted from '**Mood**:' line or a bullet list under a 'Mood' sub-heading.

component_stylings.description: Prose only in schema v1. A future v2 may add a 'component' fenced-block DSL.

dos_and_donts.description: Do's and Don'ts lists. Bullet items may be plain strings or category-tagged strings (Figmento extension: '**typography:** ...'). Parser preserves whatever form was authored.

responsive_behavior.description: Prose only in schema v1. A future v2 may add a 'breakpoints' fenced block.

agent_prompt_guide.description: Prose only. Consumed by external AI tools (Cursor, Claude Desktop, Cline) as instructions for UI generation — Figmento preserves verbatim but does not execute on the content.

color.description: Fenced-block language 'color'. Open map of string keys → CSS color values. Canonical 15 keys are recommended; additional freely-named keys preserved verbatim.

font_family.description: Fenced-block language 'font-family'. Structured typography families, weights, and OpenType/tabular features.

type_scale.description: Fenced-block language 'type-scale'. Open numeric map role → px. Canonical 10 keys recommended (display, h1-h3, heading, body_lg, body, body_sm, caption, label).

letter_spacing.description: Fenced-block language 'letter-spacing'. Open string map role → CSS length or 'normal'. Same canonical keys as type-scale.

spacing.description: Fenced-block language 'spacing'. Fixed-key numeric map — always these 8 keys. Values should follow the 8px grid (soft recommendation, enforced by the validator tool not the schema).

unit.description: Base unit — typically 8 for the 8px grid.

radius.description: Fenced-block language 'radius'. Fixed-key numeric map — always these 6 keys. 'full' is conventionally 9999 for pills.

shadow.description: Fenced-block language 'shadow'. Structured 3-level shadow tokens — always sm/md/lg, always 6 fields per level. Consumed directly by Figma effect-style creation.

elevation.description: Fenced-block language 'elevation'. OPAQUE CSS PASS-THROUGH — values are raw CSS shadow strings (often multi-layer composites) that the runtime reads without structural parsing. The schema validates only that each entry has a 'shadow' string; no CSS parsing, no contrast check, no color-token-reference check. See docs/architecture/DESIGN-MD-SPEC.md §7.1 for the trade-off rationale.

shadow.description: Raw CSS shadow expression or 'none'. Opaque to the schema.

gradient.description: Fenced-block language 'gradient'. Structured conditional — when enabled: false, only 'enabled' is required; when enabled: true, direction and colors become relevant.

colors.description: Gradient stops as CSS colors. At least 2 entries required when present.

note.description: Optional free-text note explaining where/how the gradient should be applied.

cssColor.description: A CSS color expression. Accepts #RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA, rgb()/rgba(), hsl()/hsla(), or the keyword 'none'. Semantic validation (hex validity, contrast ratios) is performed by the validate_design_md tool (DMD-3), not this schema.

cssLengthOrNormal.description: A CSS length (e.g., '-1.58px', '0.12px') or the keyword 'normal'.

figma_fallback.description: Figmento-specific: a widely-available Figma font to use when the primary family is not loaded in the target Figma file.

weights.description: Allowed font weights. May include non-standard variable-font stops (e.g., 320, 450, 510, 590).
